title: Bucket Of Bucket
description:
Store 2 buckets in one! 
What a revolutionary idea!
body:
craft a bucket of bucket (you can't see it because the perfectly fit in each other) and then when you right click they seperate into 2 buckets!
[Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c795852a65e2a2b5826d00b465436c12b32db877_0.webp)
yes it plays the tf2 thing, because it should
